subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: The capital of Rajasthan is Jaipur.
explanation: राजस्थान का प्रधान जयपुर है। यह एक अधिकांत के वित्तीय कार्यक्रम था। राजस्थान का आधिकांत का वित्तीय कार्यक्रम था।
question_en: What was the capital of Rajasthan during the time of the Udayyat Kingdom?
question_hi: राजस्थान का आधिकांत का वित्तीय कार्यकर्म था।
राजस्थान का आधिकांत का वित्तीय कार्यकर्म था।
question_en: What was the capital of Rajasthan during the time of the Udayyat Kingdom?
explanation_en: During the time of the Udayyat Kingdom, the capital of Rajasthan was Aryas Rajput.
question_en: Which Rajput clan ruled Rajasthan during the Udayyat Kingdom?
explanation_en: During the reign of the Udayyat Kingdom, the ruling clan of Rajasthan were the Suryavanshi Rajputs. Their legacy can be seen in the history and culture of the state.
explanation_hi: उदयत कॉम कॉम कॉम मत्तय कॉम कॉम मत्तय
question_en: Which Rajput clan ruled Rajasthan during the Udayyat Kingdom?
explanation_en: During the reign of the Udayyat Kingdom, the Suryavanshi Rajputs were the ruling clan.
question_en: Which Rajput clan ruled during the Udayyat Kingdom?

Options.0: उदयत कम किम कम किम किम कमतय

Options.Hindi: उदयत कम किम किम किम किमिम किम किम किमिम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किमिम किम किम किम किम किम
Options.Options: उदयत किम किम किम किम किम किम किम किम
Options.Explanation_en: The capital of Rajasthan during the time of the Udayyat Kingdom was Udaipur.
Under the Udayyat Kingdom, Udaipur served as the capital of Rajasthan.
The capital of Rajasthan during the Rajasthan Legacy was Jaipur.
